author: srimanob
body:
#### PR description:
This PR is to converge on how the workflow with GPU attributes will look like. Technically (for now), it is a free form texts to specify class, driver version, runtime, memory, runtime version. This follows https://docs.google.com/document/d/150k_VBbja1EK9HlxhXs544T0uhenbad8dnMadyNKlpg/edit?usp=sharing

When agreeing with O&C (wm team) on how to call them, the PR will be updated again. In addition, we may need to agree 
- if GPU attributes should go as global, or in task/step
- accept of empty field (by default), e.g. to CPU machine or whatever agent sees fit. We don't expect to specify these attributes in the production mode in general (except special request, campaign, to be agreed).

No need to merge, until agree. I will hold the PR.

#### PR validation:
Please ignore the workflow name I use, we can use anything we want, this is to test the output only.

`runTheMatrix.py --what upgrade -l 23234.0 -b 'HelloGPU' --label 'HelloGPU' --gpuClass server --gpuDriverVersion 460.32.03 --gpuRuntime cuda --gpuMemory 8 --gpuRuntimeVersion 11.2 --wm force`
give me the following workflow (*). However, uploading is not success yet, as we need to update wmcore to accept new attributes. 

(*)
For eyes before submitting 23234.0

title: Pilot PR for the GPU attributes in workflow injected by runTheMatrix
